archetype.name: Lion Blade
archetype.note: This archetype offers Ongoing Investigation at a different level than displayed here.

feat.name: Ongoing Investigation
feat.text: You're always investigating what's around you, even as you perform other activities. You can move at full Speed while using the Investigate exploration activity, and you can use another exploration activity while Investigating.

traits.name: Investigator
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the investigator class.

sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.
